block.name: Wire Codemine into NG topology sync
block.scope: Faux_Clawdbot — create ng_topology_sync.py, wire into app.py startup
acceptance_criteria: app.py imports run_sync as _run_ng_topology_sync and calls it after get_worker_ng()

outputs.name: ng_topology_sync.py
outputs.contract: run_sync(worker_ng) exports vector_db + imports peer experiences via docs git repo

outputs.name: app.py
outputs.contract: Calls _run_ng_topology_sync(worker_ng) after get_worker_ng() at module startup

never: Do not modify any file other than app.py
Do not touch worker_ng.py, openclaw_hook.py, or any vendored file
anti_drift: ng_topology_sync.py is a brand new file — only app.py is edited alongside it
The sync call in app.py must be try/except wrapped so failures never break startup

steps.description: Verify GITHUB_TOKEN is set (needed for docs repo clone at runtime)

params.command: python3 -c "import os; t=os.environ.get('GITHUB_TOKEN',''); print('TOKEN_OK' if t else 'TOKEN_MISSING')"

steps.description: Create ng_topology_sync.py — export/import NG topology via docs git repo
Add ng_topology_sync import to app.py after the worker_ng import line

params.old_text:
from worker_ng import get_worker_ng, ingest_tool_result, recall_context
from spec_executor import SpecExecutor
params.new_text:
from worker_ng import get_worker_ng, ingest_tool_result, recall_context
from ng_topology_sync import run_sync as _run_ng_topology_sync
from spec_executor import SpecExecutor

steps.description: Add _run_ng_topology_sync(worker_ng) call after get_worker_ng() in app.py

params.old_text:
worker_ng = get_worker_ng()          # NG singleton created first — worker owns it
ctx = RecursiveContextManager(str(REPO_PATH), ng=worker_ng)  # facade shares the same instance
params.new_text:
worker_ng = get_worker_ng()          # NG singleton created first — worker owns it
_run_ng_topology_sync(worker_ng)
ctx = RecursiveContextManager(str(REPO_PATH), ng=worker_ng)  # facade shares the same instance

params.command: python3 -m py_compile ng_topology_sync.py && python3 -m py_compile app.py && echo SYNTAX_OK

steps.description: Stage ng_topology_sync.py and app.py, commit, and push to origin

params.command: git add ng_topology_sync.py app.py && git diff --cached --quiet && echo ALREADY_COMMITTED || (git commit -m 'feat: wire Codemine into NG topology sync (BLK-NG-194)' && git push origin main && echo COMMITTED)
